title: Excel Data Input Specialist
desc:
I’m looking for a detail-minded freelancer to handle ongoing Excel data input and organisation for me. Each batch of raw information must be copied into the template I’ll supply, keeping every column, heading and note exactly as laid out.  

Here’s what will help you succeed on this project: you type a minimum of 25 WPM with at least 95 % accuracy, you are comfortable working inside Excel all day, and you double-check your work so the finished file is error-free—I aim for nothing short of 100 % accuracy. Once I send a dataset I’ll need it returned within 24 hours; typical volume takes roughly three hours of focused work daily.

Deliverable  
• A fully populated Excel file that mirrors my template, with data neatly organised, no blank records, and correct formatting throughout.

If you’re ready to start immediately, let’s chat and arrange the first batch.

title: Dermatology Google Ads Lead Campaign
desc:
I run a dermatology clinic in Bangalore and need a Google Search Ads campaign that can reliably bring in at least 25 high-quality patient enquiries each day. I already have a working list of target keywords, so the first task will be to refine that list, group it logically, and build out tightly themed ad groups.  

From there, I want you to write compelling, clinic-focused ad copy, set up all the extensions that can boost our local visibility, and install end-to-end conversion tracking (calls, forms, and chat). Once the campaign is live, I expect proactive optimisation on bids, negatives, and ad testing until we hit our lead target at an acceptable cost per acquisition.

Please send a detailed project proposal that walks me through your strategy, timetable, and how you plan to measure success. Include any case studies or metrics that prove you can deliver consistent lead volumes for healthcare or similarly competitive niches. I’m ready to move quickly once I see a clear, data-driven plan.

title: Intelligent Validation Framework for Automation and Documentation
desc:
I am a Validation Engineer seeking an experienced freelancer (AI + Python + Automation + Document Generation) to design and develop an intelligent validation framework to improve productivity by 25–30%. The framework should automate repetitive tasks and enhance documentation quality.

Key Requirements:
- Automate test report generation in Excel with graphical representations (charts/trends/comparisons).
- Automate the creation of Validation Plans and SOPs in Word, simplifying technical language for stakeholders.
- Reuse previous test data effectively to avoid repetitive testing.
- Establish a centralized repository for validation knowledge.

Ideal Skills & Experience:
- Expertise in AI, Python, and automation.
- Experience with document generation tools and frameworks.
- Familiarity with product testing and certification processes.

title: Enter Printed Data into Word
desc:
I have a stack of printed documents filled with both text and numerical details. I need every piece transcribed with total accuracy into a clean, well-structured Word document that mirrors the original layout as closely as possible.  

Please type exactly what you see, preserve any tables or simple formatting, and double-check figures so there are no transcription errors. Once complete, send back the finished .docx file and keep the source papers’ order reflected in the final document for easy cross-reference.  

If you can start right away and guarantee a meticulous eye for detail, let’s get this moving.

title: Corporate Capability Book Design
desc:
I’m putting together a 35-page Capability Book that I’ll use directly in client presentations, so the document must look polished, on-brand, and confidently corporate from cover to back page. I already have the written copy, our brand palette, fonts, and a folder of approved photographs and icons. What I need is the full layout and visual treatment: clean page templates, strong section dividers, and plenty of well-designed infographics that translate key stats and milestones at a glance.

You’ll handle:
• Structuring the content into a logical flow that reinforces our value proposition.  
• Designing charts, timelines, and other data-driven visuals where indicated.  
• Applying consistent typography, spacing, and brand colours throughout.  
• Preparing a press-ready PDF plus the editable source file (InDesign or equivalent).

The look should stay firmly corporate—think clarity, subtle sophistication, and zero clutter—while still feeling engaging when I flip through it on a screen or in print during a pitch. I’m happy to review an initial few spreads first, lock the direction, and then push through to final art.

Deliverables will be considered complete once:
1. All 35 pages follow the approved layout and brand guidelines.  
2. Graphics export crisply at both screen (RGB, 150 dpi) and print (CMYK, 300 dpi) resolutions.  
3. I receive the packaged project files and a print-ready PDF.

If you’re experienced with capability statements, annual reports, or similar collateral and ca

title: Comprehensive Villa Lighting Design
desc:
Scope of Work
The lighting design shall include, but not be limited to, the following:
Develop a complete lighting layout for all interior and exterior areas of the villa.
Determine the optimal location of every lighting fixture based on:
Interior layout
Ceiling design
Furniture arrangement
Architectural elements
Room functions
Select the appropriate lighting fixture type for each area, including but not limited to:
Downlights
Spotlights
Linear lighting
Cove lighting
Wall lights
Pendant lights
Chandeliers
Stair lighting
Landscape lighting
Façade lighting
Pathway lighting

Specify for every fixture:
Type
Dimensions
Finish and color
Wattage
Lumen output
Beam angle
Color temperature (Kelvin)
CRI (Color Rendering Index)

Create a balanced lighting concept incorporating:
Ambient Lighting
Task Lighting
Accent Lighting
Decorative Lighting
Highlight key architectural features, including:
Villa façade
Main entrance
Double-height spaces
Staircase
Corridors
Living rooms
Majlis
Dining area
Bedrooms
Walk-in closets
Bathrooms
Kitchen
Gypsum ceilings
Feature walls
Landscape and garden
Outdoor seating areas
Swimming pool (if applicable)
Design the exterior lighting to enhance the villa's architectural identity during nighttime while maintaining visual comfort, safety, and energy efficiency.
Utilize high-quality LED lighting solutions with long operational life and optimized energy consumption.
Design the lighting control system, including zon

title: Pendamping Dukungan Emosional Lewat Chat
desc:
Saya ingin ditemani oleh seseorang yang bisa memberi dorongan dan motivasi secara konsisten melalui pesan teks. Saya tidak mencari terapi klinis—hanya kehadiran hangat yang siap menyemangati dan membantu saya tetap positif ketika tantangan muncul.  

Apa yang saya butuhkan:  
• Media komunikasi hanya via chat (WhatsApp, Telegram, atau platform serupa).  
• Respons cepat pada jam yang kita sepakati, idealnya dalam 10-15 menit.  
• Pesan-pesan berisi motivasi, afirmasi, dan pengingat positif.  
• Kerahasiaan percakapan terjaga sepenuhnya.  

Nilai tambah jika Anda:  
• Terbiasa melakukan active listening atau life coaching.  
• Punya pengalaman mendukung teman, komunitas, atau klien secara daring.  
• Dapat menyediakan ringkasan inspiratif harian atau mingguan sesuai perkembangan diskusi kita.  

Beri tahu saya ketersediaan waktu Anda, pendekatan yang biasa Anda gunakan, serta contoh singkat bagaimana Anda memotivasi orang lain. Mari kita ciptakan ruang chat yang aman dan suportif.

title: Elegant Digital Fashion Portfolio
desc:
I need a refined, visually coherent fashion design portfolio presented in a single digital format—either a polished PDF or a light, scroll-friendly online version. The overall aesthetic must feel elegant and classic: balanced white space, timeless serif typography, muted accent tones, and a layout that lets each garment illustration breathe.

Content to weave into the design  
• Design Collections – a series of look-book style spreads where you can combine sketches, flats, fabric swatches, and runway shots.  
• Client Testimonials – highlighted pull-quotes that sit naturally beside the imagery without overpowering it.

I will supply raw images, sketches, copy, and brand color references. You shape them into an intuitive flow, retouch visuals where needed, and export the final deliverable ready for immediate sharing with buyers or press.

Deliverable  
1. Final portfolio as a high-resolution PDF (or a link to an equivalent hosted version).  
2. Source file (InDesign, Illustrator, or equivalent) so I can update future collections myself.

Acceptance criteria  
• Consistent margins, grid, and typography across all pages.  
• Embedded images sharp at 300 dpi.  
• File size optimized to stay under 25 MB without visible quality loss.  
• All testimonial text accurately placed and proof-read.

If you can include subtle interactive elements—clickable section tabs or embedded video panels—that would be a welcome bonus, provided the elegant feel remains intact.

title: Upgrade Social Casino Platform (React/Node/Postgres)
desc:
Full-Stack Social Casino Platform — Scale Up Existing MVP (React/Node/Postgres)

I have a working MVP of a virtual-currency casino web app (React + Node/Express + PostgreSQL) with slots, blackjack, roulette, crash, limbo, dice, and mines, plus auth, a wallet ledger, a live bet feed, a leaderboard, and an admin panel. Code will be provided as the starting point.

Looking for a developer to take this from MVP to a production-grade platform. Scope includes:

- Harden the backend: move from in-memory session state (blackjack/mines) to Redis or DB-backed sessions so games survive server restarts
- Real-time upgrades: WebSocket-based live bet feed and live crash/limbo animations instead of polling
- Monetization: in-app purchases of virtual currency (Stripe or similar) — no real-money wagering/payouts
- Mobile-responsive redesign / potential React Native app
- Expanded game library and improved animations/UX
- Production deployment: CI/CD, hosting, database migrations, monitoring
- Security review: rate limiting, input validation, auth hardening

Please share relevant experience with Node/React apps, real-time features (WebSockets), and any gaming/gambling-adjacent platform work. Provably-fair RNG experience is a plus.

Note: this is a virtual-currency platform (no real-money wagering or payouts). Please do not apply if your proposal involves adding real-money gambling functionality — that's out of scope.

Budget: hourly, will discuss based on experience and proposed timeline.

title: Accurate Excel Financial Data Entry
desc:
I’m organising several months of financial records and want them entered quickly and flawlessly into my spreadsheet-based database (Excel). All source documents are scanned and neatly labelled; I simply need each transaction transcribed into the correct columns, totals double-checked, and any discrepancies flagged.

The work is pure database entry in Excel—no other platforms are involved. You’ll be pulling figures such as dates, voucher numbers, ledger heads, debit/credit amounts and GST breakdowns, then validating every line against the supporting document. Familiarity with basic accounting terminology or tools like Tally will make the process smoother, but the key requirement is uncompromising accuracy and a steady typing rhythm.

Deliverables  
• A fully populated Excel file with every financial record entered and validated  
• Highlighted notes or a separate tab for any unclear or missing information  
• A brief completion report summarising total entries and issues resolved

I’ll provide the template, naming conventions, and a small batch first so we can confirm style and precision before you continue with the full set. Let me know your expected turnaround for approximately 2,000 lines and any prior experience with similar financial data entry projects.

title: Online Database To Excel Entry
desc:
I have a set of records sitting in an online database that I need transferred into a clean, well-structured Excel spreadsheet. The data is straightforward data entry—mostly standard fields that include both words and numbers—so accuracy is everything.  

You’ll log into the database with the credentials I provide, copy each record exactly as displayed, and place it in the corresponding columns of the Excel file I’ll share. No formatting tricks are required beyond keeping column headers consistent; I simply need the information moved over without errors or omissions.  

Please be ready to start right away and return the completed spreadsheet within 24 hours. If you spot inconsistencies while copying, flag them in a separate tab so I can review. High attention to detail and solid Excel familiarity will make this a quick, smooth task.

title: GPS Receiver Design and Development
desc:
I'm looking for a skilled engineer to design and develop a GPS receiver primarily for navigation purposes.and transmit and receive the signal over rf antenna 

Key Requirements:
- The GPS receiver should provide accurate and reliable navigation data.
- It must be designed to integrate seamlessly 
- The design should prioritize user-friendly interface and experience.

Ideal Skills and Experience:
- Proven experience in GPS technology development.
- Strong background in hardware design and software integration.
- Ability to create detailed, technical project proposals.

Please include detailed project proposals in your application.

title: Instagram Story Graphics Design
desc:
This project centers on creating a polished series of Instagram Story images that matches my brand’s look and feel. I already have a style guide—logo, colors, fonts—and concise copy for each frame, so you can dive straight into layout and visual storytelling without guesswork.  

The stories must:  
• Follow Instagram’s recommended Story dimensions (1080 × 1920 px).  
• Use my provided assets consistently while adding fresh, engaging visuals and motion where appropriate.  
• Be delivered as layered PSD or AI files plus ready-to-post PNGs.  

Although the immediate scope is Story images, I’m open to expanding into posts or highlight covers once these first visuals hit the mark, so designs that can adapt across formats are appreciated. Tools such as Photoshop, Illustrator, or comparable professional software are expected to ensure high-resolution output.  

When the files arrive, I’ll review them against the brief for color accuracy, typography consistency, and overall impact. Once approved, the milestone is complete and we can discuss any follow-on work for other platforms if desired.

title: Investor Pitch Deck Design ASAP
desc:
I’m ready to approach potential investors and need a punchy, visually cohesive pitch deck that tells my story, highlights the market opportunity, and makes the numbers sing—all on a tight timeline. The core content is drafted, but it needs to be shaped into a clear narrative and wrapped in a professional, modern design that feels consistent from cover slide to closing ask.

Turn-around is critical; I’d like to review an initial draft within 48 hours and iterate quickly until it’s investor-ready. You’re free to work in PowerPoint, Keynote, or Canva as long as I receive both an editable file and a PDF fit for email and live presentation.

When you reach out, please point me to past pitch decks or related presentation work you’ve produced so I can gauge style and quality. If you have experience tailoring slides to early-stage fundraising stories—market sizing graphics, traction charts, concise financial projections—that’s exactly what I’m after.

Deliverables:
• 10–15 slide investor deck, on-brand and visually consistent  
• Source files (editable) plus final PDF  
• Two revision rounds within the agreed timeframe  

I’m ready to move fast, so if you have availability right now and a portfolio that proves you can deliver, let’s get started.
